## Goal

Describe the serving, model, performance, security, or deployment change.

## Model and image evidence

- Model ID/revision:
- vLLM image/digest:

## Verification

- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Launcher command inspected
- [ ] Image built
- [ ] Image scan passed
- [ ] Health and model discovery passed
- [ ] Tool-call smoke test passed when inference behavior changed
- [ ] Benchmark evidence attached when GPU configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets or private prompts in logs

## Rollback

Describe the previous image, model revision, and endpoint configuration.
